import csv


def export_users(users, filepath):
    with open(filepath, "w", newline="") as f:
        writer = csv.writer(f)
        writer.writerow(["id", "name", "email", "role"])
        for user in users:
            writer.writerow([user.id, user.name, user.email, user.role])


def write_log_entries(entries, filepath):
    with open(filepath, "w", newline="") as f:
        writer = csv.writer(f)
        writer.writerow(["timestamp", "level", "message"])
        for entry in entries:
            writer.writerow([entry.ts, entry.level, entry.msg])


def generate_report(data, filepath):
    with open(filepath, "w", newline="") as f:
        writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=["metric", "value", "date"])
        writer.writeheader()
        for row in data:
            writer.writerow(row)
